paper_title: Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins: uniform designation of haemolysins, cytolysins, pleurotoxin and their genes.
verbatim_quote: The genes of the apxI operon will have the designations apxIC, apxIA, apxIB, and apxID for the activator, the structural gene and the two secretion genes respectively.

paper_title: Mutagenesis of cellulase EGZ for studying the general protein secretory pathway in Erwinia chrysanthemi
verbatim_quote: Extracellular secretion of endoglucanase Z (EGZ) from Erwinia chrysanthemi is mediated by the so-called Out general secretion pathway and, presumably, involves recognition of EGZ-carried structural information by one or more of the Out proteins.

paper_title: A bipartite signal mediates the transfer of type IV secretion substrates of Bartonella henselae into human cells
verbatim_quote: These Bartonella-translocated effector proteins (Beps) A-G are encoded together with the VirB system and the T4S coupling protein VirD4 on a Bartonella-specific pathogenicity island.

paper_title: Synergistic Hydrolysis of Carboxymethyl Cellulose and Acid-Swollen Cellulose by Two Endoglucanases (CelZ and CelY) from Erwinia chrysanthemi
verbatim_quote: CelZ is secreted using a type II secretion system which requires the sec and out genes. In contrast, 90% of CelY was secreted as an extracellular product in recombinant E. coli and this secretion was not affected by the presence of out genes.
note: literature CONTRADICTS the T2SS label: CelY is Out/T2SS-independent. Candidate drop.

paper_title: A bipartite signal mediates the transfer of type IV secretion substrates of Bartonella henselae into human cells
verbatim_quote: Similar as for BepD, NLS-Cre fusions to the BID domain-containing C terminus of BepB, BepC, and BepF were translocated into HEC, albeit at lower frequency (Fig. 3 B and F).
